Reasoning / Variance:
R: with 7 draw, and mulligans, allows you to hit land drops for the first 6 turns consistently

V: Can remove amount of lands with consistent mana dorks or ramp to hit consistent land drops for turn 6 (minimum)

Spending 1 card to get 1+n cards

R: This will get you your synergy and engine pieces

V: Do not go lower than this, you should always hit this
R: 10 for the average deck. Ramp when you’ve missed your land drop is not ramp
R: 1 card to remove 1 other card from another player. This will stop other players from doing their things
R: Not just board wipes (2), affects many things. Variance in ‘what’ it deals with is important here.

“what is the goal” getting your deck to do what you want it to do. 

Enablers: cards that allow the plan to work, engine pieces.

Payoffs: benefit from the plan happening. Reward from the plan happening, will have your wincons

Enhancers: Multipliers, make the plan better, but don’t contribute to the payoff directly
